title: Verify Trial Corner mutually exclusive with other onboarding experiments
description: Test that users assigned to Trial Corner experiment do not see other onboarding experiments
preconditions: User is assigned to Trial Corner experiment cohort

steps.description: 1. Create user assigned to Trial Corner cohort (no consumption in first 5 mins)
2. Check for presence of Trial Corner widget
3. Check for presence of other onboarding experiments

expected_result: Trial Corner widget appears, other onboarding experiments are not shown (mutually exclusive)
